_comment: Hotel Fountain BD CRM (Lumea) — Claude Desktop / Cowork project config. Updated 2026-05-01.

architecture.core_rule: Reservation-Centric. Every financial row MUST carry a non-null reservation_id. Never join by room_number or guest_name alone.

single_source_of_truth.crm_html: public/crm.html (Vercel-served). Root-level crm.html is NOT served — do not edit it.
single_source_of_truth.canonical_bill_total: reservations.total_amount. computeBill() falls back to roomCharge+extras only for legacy rows.
single_source_of_truth.today_filter: t.fiscal_day === businessDate  (never created_at — see v3.6.2 invariant)
single_source_of_truth.biz_day_dedup: per-reservation bucket keyed by room_number|guest_name; Cash/Bkash takes priority over Final Settlement

architecture.currency: BDT (৳). VAT 15% + Service Charge 5% = 20% combined markup on base rate.

key_architecture._note: As of 2026-05-01 — legacy HS256 JWT keys DISABLED and REVOKED.
key_architecture.legacy_jwt_status: REVOKED — HS256 signing key A1647548-C0A5-4EC1-8A9E-EF0A7A346551 permanently revoked 2026-05-01

coding_conventions.git_commits: MUST originate from Windows PowerShell — NOT bash sandbox (.git/*.lock files are Windows-UID-owned)
coding_conventions.after_filter_repo: git reflog expire --expire=now --all && git gc --prune=now  BEFORE push
coding_conventions.crm_html_edit_check: After any Edit to public/crm.html: grep ReactDOM.createRoot AND </html> — if either missing, restore tail immediately
coding_conventions.eslint_disable: eslint-disable-next-line must be on the line IMMEDIATELY before the flagged element — no blank line gap
coding_conventions.catch_binding: Use bare catch{} not catch(e){} when the error variable is unused
coding_conventions.date_math: ALL Dhaka date math via _dhakaParts() / todayStr() / todayDhaka(). NEVER new Date(d.toLocaleString('en',{timeZone:'Asia/Dhaka'}))
coding_conventions.folio_fetch: Always fetch folios by reservation_id. NEVER ?room_number= for folios (v3.2 regression marker)
coding_conventions.status_casing: All status comparisons UPPERCASE. CHECK constraints in DB enforce this.

schema_notes.transactions_reservation_id_fk: NOT NULL but NO FK constraint yet — manual cascade required on reservation delete (v3.5.1 open item)
schema_notes.transactions_payment_type: Column does NOT exist. Payment method is embedded in the type string: 'Room Payment (Cash)' / 'Room Payment (Bkash)'. Parse via /cash/i and /bkash/i regex.
schema_notes.guests_outstanding_balance: Cached field — DO NOT trust for display. Compute live via reservations reduce (v3.6.0).
schema_notes.folios_reservation_id_fk: FK → reservations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE — confirmed correct
schema_notes.active_fiscal_day: Stored in hotel_settings WHERE key='active_fiscal_day'. Controlled by Closing Complete button. Must never advance past Dhaka wall day (v3.5.4 guard).

pending_migrations: supabase/migrations/20260429_status_uppercase_constraints.sql — run in Supabase SQL Editor (owner action)
ADD CONSTRAINT transactions_reservation_id_fkey FOREIGN KEY (reservation_id) REFERENCES reservations(id) ON DELETE CASCADE — resolve 24 orphan tx rows first
